prompt: Three ADRs exist: 0001 (accepted), 0002 (proposed), 0003 (proposed). Compose the tech-design.md.

assertions.text: refuses to enter Stage 3 because not every ADR is accepted
explicitly identifies which ADRs are not yet accepted (0002 and 0003)
asks the user to either accept the proposed ADRs or revise them before composing
does NOT write tech-design.md to disk
actually reads the ADR files to check status (rather than trusting the prompt)
